knowledge_base.title: Past  | DISTRICT RANCHI, GOVERNMENT OF JHARKHAND  | India

knowledge.page_purpose:
This page serves as the public archive of past tender notices issued by the District Administration of Ranchi, Government of Jharkhand. It provides citizens with transparent access to completed procurement opportunities, allowing them to review what goods, services or works were recently invited for bid and the associated timelines.

The table on the page lists ten tender notices that were published between late February and mid‑March 2024. Each entry includes:

* **Title** – a brief heading of the notice (e.g., “Expression of Interest Very Short Tender Notice” for LED lights and related items, “Very Short Tender Notice regarding Birsa Harit Gram Yojna (Plantation)”, “Tender invitation under Birsa Green Village Scheme”, etc.).
* **Description** – a short explanation of what is being procured or undertaken, such as supply and installation of LED lighting, inverter batteries, centre tables and aluminium ladders at the Indoor Badminton Stadium; plantation work under the Birsa Harit Gram Yojna; short‑term works under the Birsa Green Village Scheme; comprehensive maintenance of medical‑gas pipeline equipment at Sadar Hospital; gym‑installation projects linked to the Fit India programme; wall‑writing and maintenance contracts in Patratu valley; procurement of audio equipment (mikes, speakers, amplifiers) for Vikas Bhawan conference hall; and an Expression of Interest for a halfway‑home facility.
* **Start Date** and **End Date** – the bidding window for each notice (e.g., 09/03/2024 to 16/03/2024 for the LED‑light tender, 10/03/2024 to 16/03/2024 for the plantation tender, 06/03/2024 to 13/03/2024 for the Birsa Green Village Scheme, etc.).
* **File** – a downloadable PDF (ranging from ~1 MB to ~3 MB) that contains the full tender document, accessible via a direct link to the government’s CDN storage.

Overall, the page consolidates recent tender activity in Ranchi, showing a focus on infrastructure upgrades (stadium lighting, gym installation, medical‑gas maintenance), environmental initiatives (plantation and green‑village schemes), and public‑facility improvements (audio systems, wall‑maintenance, halfway‑home planning). By presenting the titles, descriptions, dates and file links, it enables residents, businesses and other stakeholders to review past procurement actions and stay informed about government projects in the district.

knowledge_base.title: Website Policies | DISTRICT RANCHI, GOVERNMENT OF JHARKHAND | India

knowledge.page_purpose:
**Purpose of the Page**  
The “Website Policies” page outlines the rules and guidelines that govern how visitors may use the Ranchi district website, what rights and responsibilities apply to the content, and how personal information is handled.

**Key Content**

- **Terms of Use** – Explains that the Ranchi district manages the site’s content, that the information is provided for general reference and not as legal advice, and that the district is not liable for any loss or damage arising from use of the portal. It notes that external links are offered for convenience only and that any disputes are subject to Indian law and the jurisdiction of Indian courts.

- **Copyright Policy** – States that material on the site may be reproduced free of charge after obtaining permission via email, provided it is copied accurately, not used in a derogatory or misleading way, and the source is acknowledged. Reproduction does not extend to third‑party copyrighted material; permission for such material must be sought from the respective rights holders.

- **Privacy Policy** – Describes that the site does not automatically collect personal identifiers (name, phone, email) unless the user voluntarily supplies them (e.g., through a feedback form). When personal data is collected, users are informed of the purpose and appropriate security measures are applied. The site does not sell or share personally identifiable information with third parties. It does gather technical details such as IP address, domain name, browser type, operating system, visit timestamps, and pages viewed, but does not attempt to link these to individual identities.  

Together, these sections inform citizens about how they can use the website’s content, what they need to do to reuse material, and how their privacy is protected while interacting with the Ranchi district’s online portal.

knowledge_base.title: Short Term Tender Notice ''expression of interest'' (EOI) | DISTRICT RANCHI, GOVERNMENT OF JHARKHAND | India

knowledge.page_purpose:
This page is a short‑term tender notice (Expression of Interest) issued by the District Administration of Ranchi, Government of Jharkhand. It invites suppliers, agencies, firms, or establishments to submit proposals for providing food items—according to a department‑prescribed menu—to the players residing in various training centres across Ranchi district.

Key details from the notice:

- **Title:** Short Term Tender Notice “expression of interest” (EOI)  
- **Description:** Supply of food items as per the prescribed menu for residential training centre players.  
- **Submission period:** Start date 19 March 2026; end date 04 April 2026.  
- **Document:** A 9 MB PDF file titled “View (9 MB)” that can be downloaded or viewed via the link https://cdn.s3waas.gov.in/s32b8a61594b1f4c4db0902a8a395ced93/uploads/2026/03/17739125649216.pdf.  

The notice is presented in a simple table format on the website, with breadcrumb navigation showing the path Home → Notices → Announcements → Tenders → this specific tender. Social‑share buttons for Facebook and X (formerly Twitter) are also provided for easy dissemination. Citizens interested in participating can review the attached PDF for full specifications and submission instructions.

knowledge_base.title: धारा-11 के प्रकाशन के संबंध में | DISTRICT RANCHI, GOVERNMENT OF JHARKHAND | भारत

knowledge.page_purpose:
This notice, issued by the District Administration of Ranchi (Jharkhand), informs the public about a proposal to publish a notice under **Section 11** of the Right to Fair Compensation and Transparency in Land Acquisition, Rehabilitation and Resettlement Act, 2013.  

The notice concerns the **four‑lane road project** that will run from **Argora (old Argora chowk) on MDR‑08** to **New Sarai (Ring Road) on MDR‑013**, passing through the **Pundag route**. The road will be approximately **6.175 km** long and will include the construction of bridges.  

Key details provided in the notice are:

- **Purpose/Description:** Construction of the four‑lane road (including bridge work) on the stated stretch.  
- **Start Date:** 28 January 2026  
- **End Date:** 28 March 2026  
- **Associated Document:** A PDF file (≈ 2 MB) available for download/viewing at the link provided in the notice.  

The notice is intended to invite public comments or objections regarding the proposed land acquisition for this road project during the specified period. Citizens can access the full PDF via the download link to review the detailed proposal.

knowledge_base.title: टैगोर हिल | DISTRICT RANCHI, GOVERNMENT OF JHARKHAND | भारत

knowledge.page_purpose: This page is the official photo‑gallery for Tagore Hill in Ranchi, Jharkhand. It presents a collection of images of the hill (shown as thumbnails that can be enlarged in a lightbox view) and includes basic navigation aids such as a breadcrumb trail (Home → Photo Gallery → Tagore Hill) and controls to switch between grid and list views. Each image is captioned in Hindi (“टैगोर हील”) and accompanied by social‑share buttons for Facebook and X (formerly Twitter), allowing visitors to share the gallery link. The page serves to showcase the scenic and cultural aspects of Tagore Hill to citizens and tourists, providing easy access to visual information about the site.
